case_title: THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. VS. DENNIS EDWARDS

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DENNIS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DENNIS
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,105.26 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DENNIS $2,267.23 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,267.23, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY THE DEFAULT SECTION.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT --- ORIGINAL NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. SERVED JUN-07-2002, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DENNIS
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 7/12/02, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DENNIS
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. HEARING SET FOR OCT-02-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION & COUNTER AFFIDAVIT RETURNED SERVED BY SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF DEPT
ORDER --PER COMM. BEST--GRANTING DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED; THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR.
DISCOVERY 610, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION GRANTED.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DENNIS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, DENNIS
